trades.reasoning: Up +50.6% from avg cost of $50.44 — far exceeds the +12% profit target, and RSI at 90.7 is extremely overbought; locking in gains before reversal.
Top screener score of 100 with RSI at 59.9 — the only candidate in the ideal bullish momentum zone (55–70) without being overbought, with MACD crossover and volume surge confirming the move.
Score 95 with RSI 64.9 — second-cleanest setup on the screener, RSI in healthy bullish range, MACD crossover confirmed, and volume surge supporting the breakout above SMA-20.

decisions.briefing: Markets were essentially flat today — NASDAQ barely positive and S&P 500 unchanged — signaling a pause after recent momentum. XMTR has run 50%+ from our cost basis and its RSI just hit 90.7, making it a clear trim. We're rotating that capital into PTON and IONQ, the only two screener candidates with RSI in the healthy 55–70 zone rather than extreme overbought territory, giving us better risk-adjusted entries.

market_education.summary_en: Today's session was a textbook neutral day, with the S&P 500 flat and NASDAQ up just 0.2%, reflecting a market digesting recent gains after the sharp April recovery. Traders appeared cautious ahead of upcoming economic data, keeping buying interest subdued across sectors. The lack of a directional catalyst meant most moves were rotational — momentum names held gains while laggards saw mild selling pressure.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日美股呈現典型的盤整格局，標普500幾乎持平，那斯達克微升0.2%，市場在近期強勁反彈後進入消化階段。投資者在等待後續經濟數據公布之際保持謹慎，各板塊缺乏明確方向性催化劑。盤面以資金輪動為主，強勢動能股維持漲勢，弱勢個股則承受輕微賣壓。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A profit target is a pre-set price level at which you plan to sell a winning position and lock in gains. Without one, it's easy to hold too long and give back profits when the stock reverses — as XMTR's RSI of 90.7 warns it might. Setting a target (we use +12%) removes emotion and enforces discipline.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 目標獲利價（Profit Target）是投資者預先設定的出場價位，一旦持倉盈利達到該水平即獲利了結。缺乏目標獲利的紀律，容易在股價回落前過度持有而吐回收益——今日XMTR的RSI高達90.7正是此類警示。設定明確的目標獲利（本組合採用+12%）有助排除情緒干擾，確保交易紀律。
